category_sources: source_facts.description says logrotate rotates, compresses, and mails system logs.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name provides logrotate; source_facts.homepage and source_facts.repo identify the official logrotate project.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository; README is the best official documentation surface identified.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/logrotate/logrotate, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies rotation, compression, and mailing of system logs.
